methods.description: Lithofacies analysis integrates sedimentary and geochemical proxies to delineate lithofacies units according to space and time. It involves analyzing sedimentary physical properties and interpreting lithofacies and sedimentary environments.

steps.description: Analysis and calculation of indicative environmental parameters: Granulometric properties include mean (Md), sortness (So) values, which were derived from statistic computation of the grain size distribution from 300 samples taken in 14 boreholes.
steps.searchable_summary: compute granulometric properties from grain size distribution
inputs: grain size distribution data from 300 samples

steps.description: Calculate roundness coefficient (Ro) from 100 sandy thin sections taken from 14 boreholes.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate roundness coefficient from thin sections

steps.description: Estimate quartz index (Q) from 100 thin sections of unconsolidated sands taken from 14 boreholes.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate quartz index from thin sections

steps.description: Analyze acid-alkali index (pH) for 50 clay samples taken from 14 boreholes.
Analyze redox potential (Eh) for 50 clay samples taken from 114 boreholes.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze redox potential for clay samples

steps.description: Analyze exchange cation index for 50 clay samples taken from 14 boreholes.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze exchange cation index for clay samples

steps.description: Comprehensive interpretation of lithofacies based on sedimentary and geochemistry data.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret lithofacies using sedimentary and geochemistry data

methods.description: Interpretation of high-resolution seismic data sections and sequence stratigraphy to identify seismic facies and depositional systems tracts.

steps.description: Identify lowstand systems tract characterized by strong to medium amplitude, progradation seismic reflection configuration.
steps.searchable_summary: identify lowstand systems tract from seismic data

steps.description: Identify transgressive systems tract by onlapping seismic termination in the basin margin.
steps.searchable_summary: identify transgressive systems tract from seismic data

steps.description: Recognize highstand systems tract by an alternative succession of high/low amplitude, parallel pattern, and a downlapping termination of seismic reflections.
steps.searchable_summary: recognize highstand systems tract from seismic data
